title: Develop procedures to minimise risks in the use of chemicals
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop procedures to minimise risks in the use of chemicals demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify chemical use hazards and risks

pcs.text: Identify, source and analyse information relating to safe use of chemicals in industry
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, source and analyse information relating to safe use of chemicals in industry?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, source and analyse information relating to safe use of chemicals in industry.

pcs.text: Identify steps for the process of using chemicals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify steps for the process of using chemicals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify steps for the process of using chemicals.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks for the process of using chemicals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks for the process of using chemicals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks for the process of using chemicals.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify chemical use hazards and risks

elements.title: Assess risks associated with chemical use and develop control procedures

pcs.text: Assess risks associated with using chemicals in the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess risks associated with using chemicals in the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess risks associated with using chemicals in the workplace.

pcs.text: Develop control measures and emergency action plans to mitigate risk according to workplace procedures and industry best practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop control measures and emergency action plans to mitigate risk according to workplace procedures and industry best practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop control measures and emergency action plans to mitigate risk according to workplace procedures and industry best practice.

pcs.text: Develop procedures for risk control for operational activities using chemicals according to industry best practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop procedures for risk control for operational activities using chemicals according to industry best practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop procedures for risk control for operational activities using chemicals according to industry best practice.

pcs.text: Develop a continuous improvement strategy to address identified deficiencies in risk control procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a continuous improvement strategy to address identified deficiencies in risk control procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a continuous improvement strategy to address identified deficiencies in risk control procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess risks associated with chemical use and develop control procedures

elements.title: Monitor and assess adherence to chemical risk procedures

pcs.text: Provide personnel with chemical use procedures, instruction and safety equipment, including personal protective eqiupment, for using chemical control strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide personnel with chemical use procedures, instruction and safety equipment, including personal protective eqiupment, for using chemical control strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide personnel with chemical use procedures, instruction and safety equipment, including personal protective eqiupment, for using chemical control strategies.

pcs.text: Monitor and assess personnel performance against procedures for selecting equipment for chemical use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and assess personnel performance against procedures for selecting equipment for chemical use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and assess personnel performance against procedures for selecting equipment for chemical use.

pcs.text: Monitor and assess personnel performance against procedures for  operational activities of chemical use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and assess personnel performance against procedures for  operational activities of chemical use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and assess personnel performance against procedures for  operational activities of chemical use.

pcs.text: Measure the performance of personnel for following risk control procedures according to industry practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure the performance of personnel for following risk control procedures according to industry practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure the performance of personnel for following risk control procedures according to industry practice.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Monitor and assess adherence to chemical risk procedures

elements.title: Evaluate risk control measures and maintain records

pcs.text: Develop procedures for evaluating the effectiveness of risk control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop procedures for evaluating the effectiveness of risk control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop procedures for evaluating the effectiveness of risk control measures.

pcs.text: Identify shortfalls in procedures and document changes required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify shortfalls in procedures and document changes required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify shortfalls in procedures and document changes required.

pcs.text: Update procedures to reflect required changes according to industry best practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Update procedures to reflect required changes according to industry best practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Update procedures to reflect required changes according to industry best practice.

pcs.text: Develop and maintain record systems for risk assessment according to industry best practice and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and maintain record systems for risk assessment according to industry best practice and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and maintain record systems for risk assessment according to industry best practice and legislative and regulatory requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Evaluate risk control measures and maintain records

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
